subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Day of Manifestation and Flame of the Mount! Thy father bore the name of Light, and his path was one of attraction to the Beauty of the Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بیوم ظهور و شعله طور پدر را لقب نور بود و مشرب انجذاب بجمال ظهور از
